Class Reader

java.lang.Object
Properties.Reader
public class Reader extends Object
The Reader class reads from the config.properties file to determine the winning condition, number of players and number of cards. Based on the config.properties file, the Reader class can customize the number of tokens as well

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Reader()
    Initialize configProps based on the config.properties file

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    int
    getColourToken(String str)
    Returns the number of a specific color token as set in the config.properties file Used when the custom token mode is enabled
    int
    getCustomTokenMode()
    Returns 1 or 0 based on setting in config.properties file 1 indicates custom token mode where the number of tokens can be set in the config.properties file
    int
    getNumOfCards()
    Returns the number of cards as set in the config.properties file
    int
    getNumOfPlayers()
    Returns the number of players as set in the config.properties file
    int
    getPrestigePointToWin()
    Returns the number of prestige points for a player to end the game as set in the config.properties file
    String
    getTierDeck(int tier)
    Returns the file path of the specific deck tier (level of development card)

    Methods inherited from class Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • Reader

      public Reader() throws Exception
      Initialize configProps based on the config.properties file
      Throws:
      Exception - if config.properties file not found in classpath

  • Method Details

    • getPrestigePointToWin

      public int getPrestigePointToWin()
      Returns the number of prestige points for a player to end the game as set in the config.properties file
      Returns:
      number of prestige points for a player to end the game

    • getNumOfPlayers

      public int getNumOfPlayers()
      Returns the number of players as set in the config.properties file
      Returns:
      number of players

    • getNumOfCards

      public int getNumOfCards()
      Returns the number of cards as set in the config.properties file
      Returns:
      number of cards

    • getCustomTokenMode

      public int getCustomTokenMode()
      Returns 1 or 0 based on setting in config.properties file 1 indicates custom token mode where the number of tokens can be set in the config.properties file
      Returns:
      1 (custom token mode) or 0 (default)

    • getColourToken

      public int getColourToken(String str)
      Returns the number of a specific color token as set in the config.properties file Used when the custom token mode is enabled
      Parameters:
      str - color of token
      Returns:
      number of tokens of that color

    • getTierDeck

      public String getTierDeck(int tier)
      Returns the file path of the specific deck tier (level of development card)
      Parameters:
      tier - level of development card
      Returns:
      file path of the csv file containing the development cards of that level
